name: Deconstructing Actor-Critic: A Large-scale Empirical Study of Design Components for Practitioners

description: arXiv:2607.13274v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning is increasingly being considered for controlling real-world systems, from fusion plasma and autonomous vehicles to drug discovery and drinking water treatment, where reliability is essential and tuning budgets are limited. Actor-critic algorithms share a set of design decisions, such as how the policy is updated, how it re...
author: Haseeb Shah, Lingwei Zhu, Adam White, Martha White
